mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ai_portrait_task (task_id, generation_id, status, progress, retry_count, max_retries, last_error, started_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{task.taskId}, #{task.generationId}, #{task.status}, #{task.progress}, #{task.retryCount}, #{task.maxRetries}, #{task.lastError}, #{task.startedAt}, #{task.completedAt}, #{task.createdAt}, #{task.updatedAt})

update.foreach: UPDATE ai_portrait_task SET task_id = #{task.taskId}, generation_id = #{task.generationId}, status = #{task.status}, progress = #{task.progress}, retry_count = #{task.retryCount}, max_retries = #{task.maxRetries}, last_error = #{task.lastError}, started_at = #{task.startedAt}, completed_at = #{task.completedAt}, updated_at = #{task.updatedAt} WHERE id = #{task.id}

mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM ai_portrait_task WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as totalTasks, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'PENDING' THEN 1 END) as pendingCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'PROCESSING' THEN 1 END) as processingCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 END) as successCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 END) as failedCount, AVG(progress) as avgProgress, SUM(retry_count) as totalRetries, DATE(created_at) as createDate, COUNT(*) as dailyCount FROM ai_portrait_task GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY createDate DESC LIMIT 30
SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count FROM ai_portrait_task GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count, AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, started_at, completed_at)) as avgProcessingTime, MIN(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, started_at, completed_at)) as minProcessingTime, MAX(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, started_at, completed_at)) as maxProcessingTime FROM ai_portrait_task WHERE started_at IS NOT NULL AND completed_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY status
SELECT * FROM ai_portrait_task WHERE updated_at > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR) ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM ai_portrait_task WHERE status IN ('FAILED', 'PENDING') AND retry_count < max_retries AND (last_error IS NULL OR last_error NOT LIKE '%fatal%') ORDER BY updated_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT LEFT(last_error, 100) as errorPrefix, COUNT(*) as errorCount, MIN(created_at) as firstOccurrence, MAX(created_at) as lastOccurrence FROM ai_portrait_task WHERE last_error IS NOT NULL AND last_error != '' GROUP BY LEFT(last_error, 100) ORDER BY errorCount DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT HOUR(created_at) as hourOfDay, COUNT(*) as taskCount, AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, started_at, completed_at)) as avgProcessingTime, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) as successRate FROM ai_portrait_task WHERE created_at > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY HOUR(created_at) ORDER BY hourOfDay
